creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #6)
> Portclippy isn't completely consistent with the tree and one shouldn't blindly rely on it. 
Where I can find _exhaustive_ _list_ with correct order?
That's why I use portclippy and portlint - both are happy.

> Do we need the omp hack at all?
I hear some ARCHS doesn't have it (riscv64 or arm7 or powerpc*).
